title: Maid of Salem
writer: Walter Ferris, Bradley King, Durward Grinstead
actors: Claudette Colbert, Fred MacMurray, Harvey Stephens
plot: Young lovers fall afoul of repressive society as Salem elders get caught up in the witch hunts and trials of 17th-century Massachusetts. One family in particular uses the hysteria to its advantage, getting even with everyone for e...
